data.title: Remove explanatory prose and motivation framing from sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
Remove all 'Why this step exists' blocks, rationale paragraphs, motivation framing, and explanatory prose from plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md while preserving all behavioral instructions. Target: 20% word count reduction from explanatory content alone.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All 'Why this step exists' sidebar blocks removed
- All motivation/rationale paragraphs removed (e.g. 'The reason for...', 'This exists because...')
- No behavioral instructions altered or removed
- Word count reduced by at least 20%
- bash tests/run-all.sh passes with 0 failures

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (edit)
